disclaimer.middle: . Don't share sensitive data. AI responses are not your Content, may be inaccurate, and any offers provided are non-binding.

text.welcome.heading:
Not sure where to start?
Ask me anything about Adobe products.
text.welcome.subheading: Type your question or pick a suggestion below.
text.error.network: I'm sorry, I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again in a moment.
text.error.general: I'm sorry, something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
text.feedback.dialog.question.positive: What went well? Select all that apply.
text.feedback.dialog.question.negative: What went wrong? Select all that apply.
